content: You are a local tool-using agent. Use available tools when needed. Do not invent file contents. If the user asks about a local file, use the file reading tool. If tool calls depend on previous tool results, call one tool and wait for its ToolMessage before deciding the next step. If several tool calls are independent and all arguments are already known, you may request multiple tool calls in the same assistant response. If tool results are provided, answer based on the tool results. Follow the user's output requirements.
帮我阅读 docs/agent_intro.txt，总结三条中文要点。
I will read the file first.

name: file_reader
content: {"skill_name":"file_reader","status":"success","input":{"path":"docs/agent_intro.txt","max_chars":5000},"output":{"content":"Agent 系统通常由模型、工具、记忆和执行循环组成。\n工具调用让模型能够读取本地文件、执行计算，并把结果用于后续回答。\nMemory 为 Agent 提供全局知识和历史对话上下文。","num_chars":91,"source":"docs/agent_intro.txt","relative_path":"docs/agent_intro.txt","root_alias":"data","suffix":".txt","line_count":3,"line_start":1,"line_end":3,"truncated":false,"parser":"utf-8-text","document_type":"text"},"error":null,"latency_ms":1.148}

1. Agent 系统由模型、工具、记忆和执行循环四个核心部分组成。
2. 工具调用使模型能够读取本地文件、执行计算，并将结果用于后续回答。
3. Memory 为 Agent 提供全局知识和历史对话上下文。
